meta.title: DQX Tools
meta.description: Useful tools for Dragon Quest X

hero.description: A collection of useful tools for checking crafting profit, reverse monster lookup, monster encyclopedia, and map-based monster search.

equipmentStats.title: Want to check equipment stats
equipmentStats.text: I want to quickly check the latest crafting values for equipment.

costCheck.title: Want to know the cost
costCheck.text: I want to judge whether to craft while checking material costs and total cost.

reverseLookup.title: Want to search by reverse lookup
reverseLookup.text: I want to find which monsters appear on which map and where, starting from jewels, equipment, or rare drops.

craftProfit.title: Craft Profit
craftProfit.description: A tool for crafters to check profit while viewing material cost, total cost, and selling price.

monsterSearch.title: Monster Search
monsterSearch.description: Search monsters by jewels, equipment, or rare drops, and check their locations and map positions.

monsterZukan.title: Monster Encyclopedia
monsterZukan.description: A monster encyclopedia tool where you can browse monster info, drops, and appearance maps.

mapMonsterBrowser.title: Map Monster Search
mapMonsterBrowser.description: A tool to explore monsters by map and visually check where they appear.

links.about: About This Site / Terms of Use

Footer.copyrightNotice: This site is an unofficial fan site for Dragon Quest X and is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.

metadata.title: About This Site
metadata.description: A page summarizing the usage notes, copyright notice, and handling of published information for DQX Tools.

usage.title: Usage Notes
usage.text: The information on this site is organized to be as clear and easy to read as possible. However, actual in-game content may differ due to updates, specification changes, individual conditions, or simple errors in the posted information.

list.item1: The accuracy and completeness of the posted content are not guaranteed at all times.
list.item2: Please use this site at your own discretion and responsibility.
list.item3: The posted information may be revised, added to, or removed without prior notice.

usage.note: The site administrator shall not be held responsible for any disadvantage, damage, or trouble resulting from the use of information published on this site.

repost.title: Unauthorized Reproduction of Images and Text
repost.text: Please refrain from unauthorized reposting, redistribution, copying, mass screenshot reposting, or reuse on summary sites of any images, text, layouts, or uniquely organized data representations created by this site's administrator. If you wish to quote content, please notify the administrator.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.text: Dragon Quest X and all related names, in-game terms, images, settings, worldbuilding elements, and other associated rights belong to their respective rights holders. This site is an unofficial fan-made information site and does not claim any ownership of those rights.

unofficial.title: About This Unofficial Site
unofficial.text: This site is an unofficial website created to present Dragon Quest X information in a more accessible and easy-to-read format. It is not affiliated with the official operators.

header.searchPlaceholder: Search by equipment name or level

equipment.title: Equipment Info
equipment.noCrystalInfo: Cannot display because equipLevel is missing

materials.title: Craft Info
materials.noMaterials: No materials are used in this part.

salePrice.title: Suggested Sale Price
salePrice.recommendHelp: A higher recommended rate makes it easier to stay profitable

sort.kanaSoonTitle: Kana order is currently being prepared

MapMonsterBrowser.title: Map Monster Browser
MapMonsterBrowser.emptyGuide: Select a continent and map to view monsters

hero.title: Crystal Beast Split Room
hero.lead: Share server, map, and gauge color reports in one room. Open the same URL with your party members to check the current search status in real time.

section.title: Start a split search
section.lead: Create a new room or enter a shared room code to join an existing room.

create.title: Create a new room
create.lead: Use this when you are starting a new split search. After creating a room, you will move to a shareable room page.

join.title: Join an existing room
join.lead: Enter a shared room code to access the split search room.

errors.roomIdFailed: Failed to get the room ID

notice.roomNotFoundTitle: This room has not been created
notice.roomNotFoundText: The room URL you entered does not exist or may have already been deleted. Please create a new room or check the shared room code.

important.title: Important Reports
important.caption: More than 45 minutes after red report
important.empty: No important reports yet. Reports will appear here after 45 minutes have passed since a red report.

side.scheduleCaption: Deleted automatically when time is up

quick.title: Quick Report
quick.caption: Select a user and show only assigned servers
quick.noMember: After registering a user, select the user here.
quick.noMap: Please select at least one map from “Display maps”.

confirm.deleteMemberDescription: This user registration will be deleted. You can register again later with the same name if needed.
confirm.deleteReportDescription: This will remove the yellow / red report.

errors.serverOrder: Server From must be less than or equal to Server To
errors.serverRange: Server number must be between 1 and 40

tutorial.promptTitle: Would you like to view the tutorial?
tutorial.promptText: This guide will show you how to select display maps, register a player, and start reporting with Quick Report.

maps.title: 1. Select maps to display
maps.description: First, choose the maps you want to display from the map selector on the left. Only selected maps will appear in the Quick Report table.

register.title: 2. Register your player name
register.description: Next, enter your player name and assigned server range, then join the room. Your name and server range will be saved in this browser.

quick.title: 3. Start with Quick Report
quick.description: After registering, select your player and press Yellow or Red for each server and map. Red reports are automatically used for rainbow schedule notifications.
